message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for patterns coverage gaps

Add PA-48 through PA-69 covering PatternTelemetrySnapshot serde,
engine telemetry counters, is_initialized, quick_reject, rules/packs
accessors, detect_with_context dedup and agent filtering,
detect_with_context_and_trace, RuleDef get_manual_fix, PatternLibrary
new_with_user_packs, MatchTrace serde, cross-segment tail_buffer, and
Detection dedup_key variation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
